rows.need: bind attributes to the correct entity instead of nearby subjects
rows.title: Entity / Attribute Relation Lens

rows.need: ground frequency qualifiers before turning claims into universal rules
rows.title: Frequency Adverb Lens

rows.need: preserve degree qualifiers attached to claims or quantities
rows.title: Qualifier Degree Lens

rows.need: separate historical state from current state before reuse
rows.title: Historical / Current State Guard

rows.need: bind interval endpoints and avoid treating ranges as single scalar facts
rows.title: Range / Interval Lens

rows.need: keep included and excluded item sets separated
rows.title: Excluded / Included Items Lens

rows.need: bind recommendations to their supporting evidence and scope
rows.title: Conclusion / Recommendation Lens

rows.need: ground dependency chains and preserve prerequisite order
rows.title: Dependency Chain Lens

rows.need: bind result/finding language to the evidence span and avoid overclaiming
rows.title: Finding Claim Lens

rows.need: track whether an uncertainty has been resolved before answer commit
rows.title: Uncertainty Resolution Lens

rows.need: ground mapping/normalization rules without applying them outside scope
rows.title: Normalization Mapping Lens

rows.need: keep assumptions from becoming unconditional committed facts
rows.title: Assumption Marker Guard

rows.need: bind comparison outcomes to baseline/control context
rows.title: Comparison / Control Group Lens

rows.need: detect sensitive identifiers and keep them from unsafe propagation
rows.title: Sensitive Identifier Lens

rows.need: bind permissions to the correct role or actor
rows.title: Role / Permission Assignment Lens

rows.need: ground license conditions and avoid over-broad reuse claims
rows.title: License Condition Lens
